title: Opportunity to Collaborate: monday.com App Engineer / SDK Developer
excerpt:
Hi everyone! :waving_hand:

posts.author: fitriyahab (Fitriyah Aufa Bahalwan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

We’re looking to collaborate with a developer experienced in building with the monday Apps Framework (React + SDK).

This is a great opportunity for someone excited about:

  • Managing and improving existing monday Marketplace app
  • Designing and launching new, impactful apps from scratch
  • Partnering closely with a product-focused team

What we’re looking for:
• Experience with the monday Apps Framework and SDK
• Familiarity with submitting and maintaining apps on the monday Marketplace

If this sounds like a good fit, feel free to DM me, happy to share more context and explore a potential collaboration!

Thanks so much

posts.author: Alex_Robinson_au (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @fitriyahab,
Would love to connect with you and discuss this opportunity further with you.
We have extensive experience with monday.com App Marketplace and have also worked with others to bring their apps to life.
Connect with me here
If no times suit you please let me know as I can find alterative times to suit.

posts.author: fitriyahab (Fitriyah Aufa Bahalwan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Alex_Robinson_au, thanks for reaching out, I appreciate you sharing your experience!

I’ve just booked a time through your Calendly for Wednesday. Looking forward to connecting and discussing how we might collaborate on Monday app development!

See you soon!

posts.author: shadab (Shadab)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey I am a monday app developer and an experienced indie maker and bootstrapper.
Would love to discuss on this more.
PS: I am not looking for a job but potential collab for building monday apps and partnering as a tech founder.

posts.author: Sam_Cnet (Sam Bazargan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Fitriyah!

Im available to collaborate.

If email works for you please drop me a message at hello@achieveapplabs.com.

Looking forward to connecting

Regards,
Sam
